headline: England Thrash It, Nana Takes a Knock
text: Big day for Alex, whose England belted Croatia 4-2 and gave his sweepstake a proper lift. Sara also nicked a vital 1-0 with Ghana, while Chris took a hit as Colombia beat Nana’s Uzbekistan 3-1. Up top, Grandad still leads on 7, but Nana is right on his heels with 6, and Chris isn’t far back. At the other end, Sofia is still rooted to the floor on 1, with Rosaria and Jack stuck in the chasing pack. Best overall? Grandad. Worst? Sofia, with the table doing her no favours at all.
